description.default: 一个思源笔记插件，用于集中管理分散在整个工作空间的任务，给任务增加开始时间、计划完成时间、实际完成时间、优先级、备注等信息。
description.en_US: A Siyuan notes plug-in to centrally manage tasks scattered throughout the workspace, adding start time, planned finish time, actual completion time, priority, notes, and other information to tasks.
